title: Convert Financial Statement PDF to Excel - Extract Data for Analysis
metaTitle: Financial Statement PDF to Excel Converter | Extract Data Fast
metaDescription: Convert financial statement PDFs to Excel spreadsheets with AI extraction. Extract balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow data for analysis.
h1: Convert Financial Statement PDF to Excel

hero.headline: Extract Financial Statement Data from PDF to Excel
hero.subheadline: Convert balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow reports into structured Excel spreadsheets for financial analysis and auditing

summary: Transform financial statement PDFs into Excel spreadsheets with AI-powered data extraction. Extract key financial metrics, line items, and figures from balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow statements for analysis, comparison, and audit preparation.
whenThisIsRelevant: Converting quarterly or annual financial reports to Excel
Extracting specific line items from multiple company statements
Preparing financial data for analysis or modeling
supportedInputs: Digital PDF financial statements from company reports
JPEG or PNG images of financial statements
expectedOutputs: Excel files with financial line items in separate columns
CSV files with extracted financial metrics and values
commonChallenges: Financial statements contain complex multi-column layouts
Key figures are embedded in dense paragraph text
Multiple periods require side-by-side comparison in Excel
Extracting specific ratios and calculations from narrative sections
howItWorksSteps: Upload your financial statement PDF or image file
AI identifies financial line items, figures, and periods
Select which financial metrics to extract into columns
Download structured Excel file with organized financial data
whyPdfExcelAiFits: AI recognizes standard financial statement formats and line items
Custom field selection lets you choose specific metrics to extract
Batch processing handles multiple quarterly reports simultaneously
OCR handles both digital and scanned financial documents
limitations: Complex nested financial tables may require manual review of extracted data
Heavily formatted or non-standard financial statement layouts may need field customization
Accuracy depends on document clarity and scan quality

faq.question: Can it extract data from both balance sheets and income statements?
faq.answer: Yes, the AI can extract data from balance sheets, income statements, cash flow statements, and other standard financial report formats, organizing the data into structured Excel columns.

faq.question: How does it handle multi-period financial statements?
faq.answer: The system can extract data from financial statements showing multiple periods (quarterly, yearly comparisons) and organize them into separate columns for easy period-over-period analysis.

faq.question: What happens if my financial statement has a non-standard layout?
faq.answer: Non-standard layouts may require custom field selection to ensure accurate extraction. You can specify which financial line items to target during the conversion process.

faq.question: Can it process annual reports with multiple financial statements?
faq.answer: Yes, it can process multi-page annual reports containing various financial statements, though complex nested tables may need manual review to ensure complete accuracy.

trustSignals: Files encrypted and automatically deleted after processing
Free to start with pay-as-you-go pricing
Supports both digital and scanned financial statements
exampleUseCases: Investment analyst extracting revenue and profit data from quarterly earnings reports
Auditor converting multiple client financial statements for comparative analysis
Financial researcher organizing historical financial data from annual reports
Credit analyst extracting balance sheet ratios for loan underwriting
